case_title: SCOTT LEVINE VS. SEQUOIA CASHA GANT

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, SCOTT
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-28-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF SCOTT LEVINE IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SEQUOIA CASHA GANT IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS REVIEWED IN OPEN COURT AND RETURNED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $1,405.85 RE 36471 FOR TRANSACTION W0520B12D007 (DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT), PAYABLE TO SCOTT LEVINE, DOC#1910697028, WARRANT #38206498, DATED DEC-03-2020
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED JUN-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-10-2019 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO AUG-28-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
COPYING FEES (1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA
JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST FOR FUNDS FILED. COPY OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR'S REQUEST SCANNED INTO IJS, EMAIL SENT TO AREVENUE@SFTC.ORG & COPY TO ACCOUNTING DEPT BASKET. FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, SCOTT
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,157.00 FILED BY LEVINE, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-10-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
D.M.V. CERTIFICATE OF FACTS RE UNSATISFIED JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, SCOTT AS TO DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA
DEPOSIT OF JUDGMENT DEBTOR BY DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVINE, SCOTT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA $1,139.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,254.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
DECLARATION RE: CORRECTION TO DEFENDANT'S ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEVINE, SCOTT
NOTICE TO JUDGMENT CREDITOR OF DEPOSIT OF FILED BY DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT GANT, SEQUOIA CASHA
